meta.note: Quotes, news, earnings & analyst trends are live (Finnhub). Technicals are derived from live price/returns; options chains, IV and flow are modeled (no free options data).

news.headline: We're adding to our position in a consumer bank that benefits from lower oil prices
news.summary: Concerns about consumer credit have weighed on this stock since the Iran war began.

news.headline: Strait of Hormuz traffic to return to normal as soon as August, Kalshi traders speculate
news.summary: Odds that the Strait of Hormuz traffic will return to normal before August surpassed 50%, following U.S. President Donald Trump's announcement.

news.headline: The Club's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Monday
news.summary: Oil is plunging and futures are surging after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a memorandum of understanding to end the war.

news.headline: Inside the unique challenges of military spouse entrepreneurs: 'Not everybody is going to understand this life'
news.summary: Military spouses turn to entrepreneurship amid high rates of unemployment. They face high barriers to success, but a growing coalition is pushing for more help.

news.headline: Fox to buy streaming device maker Roku for $22 billion
news.summary: Fox, the owner of the news and sports networks, said it has reached a deal to acquire Roku for about $22 billion in enterprise value.

news.headline: Shippers remain cautious on Hormuz strait transit after US and Iran agree deal - Reuters
news.summary: Shippers remain cautious on Hormuz strait transit after US and Iran agree deal  Reuters

news.headline: Trading Near Its 52-Week Low, Is Palantir Technologies Stock a Buy?
news.summary: This once-hot artificial intelligence stock is down 28% this year.

news.headline: Musk Hits $1.05 Trillion As SpaceX Opens 11% Above IPO Price
news.summary: SpaceX's $150 debut valued the company near $2 trillion, pushing Musk's fortune to almost $1.05 trillion.

news.headline: Apple supplier Jabil, Adani partner to build AI data center infra platform in India

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $742.12 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $754.62 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Strong Bullish — favor calls / long delta.
Use QQQ $742.12 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: AMD CALL — enter $31.30–$34.60, target $49.43+, stop $19.77.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a firmer open with QQQ +2.88% and SPY +1.74%. Composite sentiment +81 (Strong Bullish). The tape is being driven mainly by spy trend, qqq / mega-cap tech, vix. VIX at 12.45 (-5.11%). Environment read: favor calls / long delta. Industrials (+4.37%) is leading while Energy (-3.66%) lags. Premarket strength in AMD, COIN; weakness in XOM, LLY. The desk's highest-conviction setup is AMD (7.7/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
